claim: CartiGSFM defines a three-layer cartilage state model
rationale: This is a description of the method architecture, not an empirical claim
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal unless explicitly stated otherwise
Do not claim mechanistic proof
Do not claim clinical or translational utility without external validation

claim: Full three-layer model outperforms single-layer alternatives on tissue classification and OA classification
rationale: Supported by P5 ablation study showing full model has best balanced accuracy and AUROC
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal unless explicitly stated otherwise
Do not claim mechanistic proof
Do not claim clinical or translational utility without external validation

claim: Avascular_Antimineralization axis scores are increased in OA cartilage
rationale: FDR significant, high robustness score correlation, confirmed in P3 analysis
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal unless explicitly stated otherwise
Do not claim mechanistic proof
Do not claim clinical or translational utility without external validation

claim: ECM, MMP, and ADAMTS remodeling axes are significantly increased in OA
rationale: All pass FDR significance in P3 atlas analysis, high robustness
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal unless explicitly stated otherwise
Do not claim mechanistic proof
Do not claim clinical or translational utility without external validation

claim: Hypoxia and Ferroptosis scores are decreased in OA compared to normal hyaline cartilage
rationale: FDR significant in P3 analysis, counterintuitive direction but statistically valid
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal unless explicitly stated otherwise
Do not claim mechanistic proof
Do not claim clinical or translational utility without external validation

claim: ElasticCartilage_Auricular axis identifies NEC/ear cartilage samples
rationale: Significant difference in P3, but note low top-label stability (~0.30)
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal unless explicitly stated otherwise
Do not claim mechanistic proof
Do not claim clinical or translational utility without external validation

claim: Microtia cartilage preserves elastic cartilage identity (AvAm and ElasticCartilage axes not different from normal)
rationale: No significant differences detected, but n=3 vs n=4 severely underpowered
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal unless explicitly stated otherwise
Do not claim mechanistic proof
Do not claim clinical or translational utility without external validation

claim: Microtia cartilage shows trends toward increased inflammation and hypoxia signaling
rationale: Trends visible but do not pass FDR threshold due to small sample size
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal unless explicitly stated otherwise
Do not claim mechanistic proof
Do not claim clinical or translational utility without external validation

claim: CartiGSFM has been externally validated on independent datasets
rationale: P4 not completed, no external validation has been performed
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal unless explicitly stated otherwise
Do not claim mechanistic proof
Do not claim clinical or translational utility without external validation

claim: CartiGSFM is a trained cartilage large language model (LLM)
rationale: CartiGSFM is a dictionary-based projection method, NOT an LLM. This is a fundamental misrepresentation
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal unless explicitly stated otherwise
Do not claim mechanistic proof
Do not claim clinical or translational utility without external validation

claim: All CartiGSFM atlas findings should be considered pending independent experimental validation
rationale: True by design - all results are atlas-internal and need independent confirmation
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal unless explicitly stated otherwise
Do not claim mechanistic proof
Do not claim clinical or translational utility without external validation

claim: Inflammation_NFkB, IL1_Signaling, and TNF_Signaling are significantly increased in OA
rationale: Inflammation axes show trends but DO NOT pass FDR < 0.05 significance threshold
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal unless explicitly stated otherwise
Do not claim mechanistic proof
Do not claim clinical or translational utility without external validation

claim: OA inflammation axes show non-significant trends toward increased scores
rationale: Inflammation_NFkB, IL1_Signaling, TNF_Signaling all show upward trends in OA but none reach FDR significance threshold
required_caveats: All results are atlas-internal only
No axis reaches FDR significance threshold
Trend only, not statistically significant
